human_exposure_under_control.interpretation: No unacceptable human exposure pathways currently exist across the entire site
human_exposure_under_control.notes: Soil cleanup completed; groundwater contamination remains within site boundary but does not affect nearby residences or businesses

groundwater_migration_under_control.interpretation: Migration of contaminated groundwater is stabilized; no unacceptable discharge to surface water; monitoring confirms containment
groundwater_migration_under_control.notes: Deed restrictions prohibit groundwater use at the site

construction_complete.interpretation: Physical construction is not complete OR actions are still needed to address contamination
construction_complete.notes: Notable: despite soil cleanup completed in 2011, Construction Complete remains 'No'. This likely reflects ongoing groundwater remedy requirements.

sitewide_ready_for_anticipated_use.interpretation: One or more of: cleanup goals not fully achieved, land-use restrictions not fully in place, or Construction Complete not achieved

health_environment_risk_summary.source: EPA Health & Environment — What Are the Risks section
health_environment_risk_summary.soil_status: Soil cleanup completed; soil no longer poses potential threat to future site users. Soil cleanup has helped improve groundwater quality.
health_environment_risk_summary.groundwater_status: Some groundwater contamination remains within the site boundary, but does not affect nearby residences or businesses. Deed restrictions prohibit groundwater use at the site.
health_environment_risk_summary.monitoring_confirmation: EPA will conduct monitoring to confirm that affected groundwater remains in the original area of contamination

contaminant_list.link_text: View a full list of contaminants of concern for this site

pending_confirmation: Why Construction Complete = No despite soil remedy completion in 2011 — likely due to groundwater O&M phase
Contaminant list with concentrations and media
